name: Analyze git history and extract statistics
prompt: There is a git repository in the 'project' directory. Analyze its git history and write a report to git_report.json with: (1) total_commits: total number of commits, (2) authors: array of unique author names sorted alphabetically, (3) files_changed: total number of unique files that were ever modified across all commits, (4) most_active_author: the author with the most commits, (5) first_commit_date: the date of the earliest commit in YYYY-MM-DD format, (6) last_commit_date: the date of the most recent commit in YYYY-MM-DD format, (7) merge_commits: number of merge commits (commits with more than one parent).

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
